name: Slack Status
description: Sets your Slack status via the Slack API
author: AgentOS

steps.command: $token = $env:SLACK_TOKEN; if (-not $token) { Write-Output 'Set SLACK_TOKEN environment variable first'; exit 1 }; $body = @{ profile = @{ status_text = 'Working remotely'; status_emoji = ':house:'; status_expiration = 0 } } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'https://slack.com/api/users.profile.set' -Method Post -Headers @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token"; 'Content-Type' = 'application/json' } -Body $body | Select-Object ok, error | Format-List
